artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found one strong COLMEX-hosted publication-level AI-use policy for Anuario Asia Pacifico. Other official COLMEX AI-related results were rejected because they were events, a program description, or a research hiring call rather than policy or guidance evidence.

artifacts.claimText: The Anuario Asia Pacifico El Colegio de Mexico requires authors to declare whether they used AI tools in any research phase and, if so, identify the tools, versions, and specific tasks.

artifacts.title: El Colegio de Mexico A.C. staged AI policy evidence
artifacts.summary: Staged evidence is limited to the official Anuario Asia Pacifico El Colegio de Mexico AI-use policy. Claims are scoped to that publication's author disclosure, editorial admissibility review, reviewer AI-use restriction, and disclosed NotebookLM use for historical article summaries.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
No central university-wide COLMEX AI policy was found in this crawl; publication-level claims must not be generalized to all COLMEX teaching, students, or research.
